title: OpenAI Previews GPT-5 Agentic Workflow Capabilities at Developer Day
summary: OpenAI's annual Developer Day showcased GPT-5's native agentic workflow capabilities, including the ability to autonomously plan, execute multi-step tasks, and recover from errors without human intervention. The new function-calling API design dramatically reduces latency for tool-use-heavy applications.
shareText: OpenAI previewed GPT-5's native agentic capabilities at Developer Day — autonomous multi-step task execution with built-in error recovery. The agent era is here. 🤖 #AI #OpenAI #GPT5
